prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 17 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Major Depressive Disorder
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.6 kg; Height 169.1 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/87 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 275mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 239mg/dL; 3 months ago 221mg/dL; current 193mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.7kg; 9 months ago 71.7kg; 6 months ago 72.9kg; 3 months ago 67.8kg; current 72.6kg), Height (12 months ago 169.1cm; 9 months ago 169.1cm; 6 months ago 169.1cm; 3 months ago 169.1cm; current 169.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 143mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 87mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 62U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 61U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 56U/L), AST (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 32U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.3mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 5mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 186mg/g; 9 months ago 155mg/g; 6 months ago 229mg/g; 3 months ago 259mg/g; current 238mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 119mg/dL; 9 months ago 122mg/dL; 6 months ago 117mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
